sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.10 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: a) Is it possible to embed a finitely generated non-abelian free pro-$p$group as an open subgroup of a simple totally disconnected locally compact group? b) If the answer is yes, can we require that the simple envelope is also compactly generated? Comment of 2025: Partial progress on part b) is made in (Y.\,Barnea, M.\,Ershov, A.\,Le\,Boudec, C.\,D.\,Reid, M.\,Vannacci, T.\,Weigel, Preprint, 2025,...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
